components.name: RHEL 7
components.notes: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 reached End of Life on June 30, 2024.

components.name: Python 3.9
components.notes: Python 3.9 reached End of Life on October 5, 2025. No security patches from PSF.

components.name: Apache Tomcat 6.1
components.notes: Apache Tomcat 6.x reached End of Life in December 2016. Very old and unsupported.

components.name: PostgreSQL 13
components.notes: PostgreSQL 13 reached End of Life on November 13, 2025.

summary: AnalyticsApp-003 has the highest EOL component count with all four assessed components at EOL or approaching EOL. Although containerized (positive factor), the entire technology stack requires urgent upgrading.
